title: Excise and GST/HST News - Canada.ca
content:
## Excise and GST/HST News
Subscribe to our electronic mailing list , and we will notify you by email when the latest edition of Excise and GST/HST News is on our Web site.
You can also subscribe to the Excise and GST/HST News RSS feed .
